children.text: ensure that any State rules, regulations, and policies relating to this chapter conform to the purposes of this chapter;

identify in writing to local educational agencies located in the State and the Secretary any such rule, regulation, or policy as a State-imposed requirement that is not required by this chapter and Federal regulations; and
minimize the number of rules, regulations, and policies to which the local educational agencies and schools located in the State are subject under this chapter.

children.heading: Support and facilitation
children.label: b Support and facilitation
children.text: State rules, regulations, and policies under this chapter shall support and facilitate local educational agency and school-level system improvement designed to enable children with disabilities to meet the challenging State student academic achievement standards.
